# clo_dbaas_backups (Data Source)

Fetches the list of dbaas backups in the project

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_dbaas_backups" "all" {
  project_id = "1e8ff0f7-0b8c-4ec5-a0a4-e30cea0db287"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) ID of the project that owns the backups

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `result` (List of Object) The object that holds the results (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `created_in` (String)
- `data_size` (Number)
- `datastore_name` (String)
- `datastore_version` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `parent` (String)
- `project` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
